job_statement: Install and deploy a new Argo CD instance to manage cluster configurations or deploy applications
situation: When I need to manage cluster configurations or deploy applications using GitOps in a specific namespace
motivation: So that I can have an isolated Argo CD instance with permissions to manage resources in my namespace

job_statement: Scale Argo CD server and repo server replicas to distribute workloads
situation: When I need to improve performance and distribute workloads across multiple Argo CD server and repo server pods
motivation: So that my Argo CD instance can handle higher loads and be more resilient
evidence: setting-up-argocd-instance-reduced.adoc -> Section 'Enabling replicas for Argo CD server and repo server', lines 29-61 [module: modules/gitops-enable-replicas-for-argo-cd-server.adoc, type: PROCEDURE]
notes: Source module: modules/gitops-enable-replicas-for-argo-cd-server.adoc (PROCEDURE). Assembly: cicd/gitops/setting-up-argocd-instance.adoc. Note: horizontal autoscaler will override manual replica settings if enabled.

job_statement: Configure Argo CD to manage resources in namespaces other than where it's installed
situation: When I need my Argo CD instance to deploy and manage applications in multiple namespaces across the cluster
motivation: So that I can use a centralized Argo CD instance to manage resources across different project namespaces
evidence: setting-up-argocd-instance-reduced.adoc -> Section 'Deploying resources to a different namespace', lines 63-73 [module: modules/gitops-deploy-resources-different-namespaces.adoc, type: PROCEDURE]
notes: Source module: modules/gitops-deploy-resources-different-namespaces.adoc (PROCEDURE). Assembly: cicd/gitops/setting-up-argocd-instance.adoc. Requires labeling target namespaces with argocd.argoproj.io/managed-by label.

job_statement: Customize which Argo CD instance appears in the OpenShift console link
situation: When working in a multi-tenant cluster with multiple Argo CD instances and the wrong instance is linked in the console
motivation: So that users can access the correct Argo CD instance from the console application launcher without confusion
evidence: setting-up-argocd-instance-reduced.adoc -> Section 'Customizing the Argo CD console link', lines 75-114 [module: modules/gitops-customize-argo-cd-consolelink.adoc, type: PROCEDURE]
notes: Source module: modules/gitops-customize-argo-cd-consolelink.adoc (PROCEDURE). Assembly: cicd/gitops/setting-up-argocd-instance.adoc. Requires administrator privileges. Uses DISABLE_DEFAULT_ARGOCD_CONSOLELINK environment variable in the Subscription CR.
